verses.2: “How have you helped him who is without power!
verses.3: How have you counseled him who has no wisdom,
verses.4: To whom have you uttered words?
verses.7: He stretches out the north over empty space,
verses.8: He binds up the waters in his thick clouds,
verses.9: He encloses the face of his throne,
verses.10: He has described a boundary on the surface of the waters,
verses.12: He stirs up the sea with his power,
verses.13: By his Spirit the heavens are garnished.
verses.14: Behold, these are but the outskirts of his ways.
